messages.content: Hi, I just signed up for FlowDesk yesterday. My name is Priya Kapoor. I'm trying to set up my workspace but I'm running into some issues and I don't know if it's a bug or if I'm doing something wrong.

Hi Priya, welcome to FlowDesk! Setting up a new workspace can definitely have a few bumps — let's get this sorted for you. Can you tell me what plan you signed up for and what specifically isn't working? The more detail you give me, the faster we can figure out whether this is a configuration issue or something on our end.

I signed up for the Pro plan — the annual one, $299 per year. I have a team of 8 people I need to add. The problem is that when I try to invite team members, I keep getting an error that says "seat limit reached" even though I haven't added anyone yet. It won't let me send a single invite.

That's definitely not expected behavior — the Pro plan supports up to 15 seats so you shouldn't be hitting any limit with 8 people. The "seat limit reached" error at zero members usually means the workspace was created in a trial state rather than being fully provisioned to your paid plan. This sometimes happens when there's a slight delay between payment confirmation and account provisioning. Can you check your account settings under Billing — does it show your plan as "Pro Annual" or does it say "Trial" anywhere?
It says "Pro Annual" in billing. But wait, I'm looking more carefully and under "Plan Details" it says "Seats: 1/1." So it looks like it thinks I only have 1 seat even though I paid for Pro.

Found it — that's a provisioning mismatch. Your payment went through correctly and the billing page reflects Pro Annual, but the seat allocation wasn't updated from the default 1-seat configuration. This is a backend issue on our end, not anything you did wrong. I'm escalating this to our provisioning team right now with your account details. You should see the seat count update to 15 within the next 2 hours. I'll also note this on your account so if you contact us again before it's fixed, the next agent will have the full context. Does everything else in the workspace look correct, or are there other issues?
Everything else looks okay I think. But I do want to ask — I noticed the Pro plan is supposed to include Gantt chart view. I can't find it anywhere in the interface. Is it hidden somewhere?

Good catch — Gantt chart view is indeed included in Pro. It's accessible from within any project by clicking the view switcher at the top right of the task list — it looks like a small grid icon, and "Gantt" should be one of the dropdown options. If you're not seeing it there, it's possible the workspace provisioning issue that affected your seats also affected your feature flags. Once the provisioning team fixes the seat count, Gantt should appear automatically. If it doesn't show up within 2 hours after the seats are fixed, reply here and I'll get the feature flags corrected separately.

Okay thank you. One more thing — I work in a digital marketing agency. My team handles multiple client projects simultaneously, sometimes 20-30 active projects at a time. I chose FlowDesk specifically because of the client portal feature. Is that available on my plan?

Noted — a digital marketing agency managing 20–30 concurrent client projects is exactly the use case the Pro plan is built for. Client portal is available on Pro, yes. You'll find it under each project's settings — there's a "Client Access" toggle that generates a shareable read-only link for that project's status. Clients can see task progress, deadlines, and any files you've explicitly shared without needing a FlowDesk account. I've logged all of this on your account: Pro Annual plan, team of 8, digital marketing agency, 20–30 concurrent client projects, primary interest in client portal. This helps us give you context-relevant support in future conversations. I'll follow up in about 2 hours once the provisioning team confirms the seat fix.
Perfect, thanks. I'll check back if the seats aren't fixed.
Sounds good — I've flagged your ticket as high priority given it's blocking your entire onboarding. You should be fully operational very soon. Welcome to FlowDesk, Priya.
